code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut result = ""
  mut first_word = true
  mut word_start = 0 - 1

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    let is_end = i == n
    let b = if is_end
      32
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if is_ws
      if word_start >= 0
        let word = string.substring(line, word_start, i)
        let first = match string.byte_at(word, 0)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        mut transformed = word
        if first >= 97 and first <= 122
          let upper = string.from_byte(first - 32)
          let rest = string.substring(word, 1, string.len(word))
          transformed = "#{upper}#{rest}"
        end
        if not first_word
          result = "#{result} "
        end
        result = "#{result}#{transformed}"
        first_word = false
        word_start = 0 - 1
      end
    else
      if word_start < 0
        word_start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println(result)
end
